title: Jitendra Kumar
subtitle: Born in northern India. Based in Paris.
paragraphs: Jitendra grew up immersed in the yoga tradition. In France for ten years, he teaches a structured practice that meets each student where they are — where gesture stays tied to lineage.

Certified in Hatha Yoga after 500 hours at Centre Tapovan Paris, he deepens the practice through the study of Sanskrit and the foundational texts. His method rests on grounding: bodily stability to quiet the nervous system, alignment, and the building of strength — so that energy can circulate freely.
He also teaches at L'école châlonnaise « Au pied du cerisier » and in yoga teacher-training programmes at Tapovan Open University in Normandy.
portrait_alt: Jitendra Kumar, Hatha Yoga teacher, in namaste
